narrative:
DRIVER
USD tops CSM at 100 on both D1 and H4 in a Risk-Off High regime, with copper down 4.81%, silver down 9.13%, and S&P 500 down 1.24% stripping commodity and risk currencies simultaneously. USDCAD is the cleanest expression — H4 Strong Buy, D1/H4 CSM both accelerating (55 vs 33 divergence flagged as primary short-term signal), 1212 CMP at 60 with H4 at 70 rising, and USDCAD correlates -0.68 with CADJPY confirming CAD deterioration across the board. AUD H4 CSM collapses to 26 against D1 at 65, a 39-point divergence that overrides any residual D1 bullish AUD read — AUDUSD H4 sell at 26 momentum is the fade, not a buy.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60, H4 70 rising, D1 59 accelerating — both timeframes aligned long
Fading: EURUSD CMP 37 H4 13 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 36 H4 13 collapsing, NZDUSD CMP 43 H4 17 fading hard

WATCH
WTI oil extended 4.2% spike hits USDCAD directly — if oil reverses intraday, USDCAD long stops compress fast
Silver continuing below 77.00 confirms AUDUSD breaks next structural support, accelerating H4 sell signal
US 10Y yield holding above 4.60% validates inflation-driven USD demand, sustaining USDCHF H4 Strong Buy momentum

themes.theme: Inflation Concerns Driving Bond Yields Higher
Energy Market Volatility on Supply Disruption

key_observation: Strong risk-off sentiment evidenced by equities selloff and bond yield spikes on inflation fears. USD strengthening as safe-haven bid. Commodity weakness across agricultural complex with notable Brazilian Real pressure from sugar selloff. Energy volatility from supply concerns provides mixed signals.
watch: Inflation data persistence and central bank response. Brazilian Real trajectory given commodity exposure. Equity market stabilization as key barometer for risk-sentiment reversal. Oil supply disruption duration and impact on broad inflation narrative.
